title: harpalyce pringlei
intro: Harpalyce pringlei, also known as Pringle's harpalyce, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, Harpalyce pringlei has been used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Harpalyce pringlei include its potential to reduce fever, ease digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Harpalyce pringlei is often prepared as a decoction, or an infusion, and is typically administered as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
